title: Kenya’s ride-hailing drivers abandon apps as fuel strike cripples Nairobi

title: 👨🏿‍🚀TechCabal Daily – GoTyme employees to receive stocks
summary: In today's edition: GoTyme employees to receive stock options Vumatel to acquire 100% Herotel fibre business a16z backs Stitch, a Saudi-based fintech NCBA signs EV asset financing deal
